What I Do

SEO Services

Full-cycle SEO solutions — from deep technical audits to high-ranking content that drives real organic growth.

🔍

Technical SEO

Full site audits, Core Web Vitals, crawl & index management, schema markup (JSON-LD), site speed optimization, and structured data implementation.

🎯

On-Page SEO

Keyword research, search intent mapping, topical authority clusters, title tags, meta descriptions, header optimization, and internal linking strategy.

🔗

Link Building

White-hat outreach campaigns, guest posting, digital PR, niche edits, and authority link partnerships to build domain trust.

✍️

SEO Content Writing

Blog posts, landing pages, and web copy using E-E-A-T principles, NLP optimization, and keyword strategy — content that ranks and converts.

📍

Local SEO

Google Business Profile optimization, local citation building, and location-based SEO strategies for brick-and-mortar and service businesses.

🤖

GEO (AI SEO)

Generative Engine Optimization — optimizing for AI search like ChatGPT, Google SGE, and Perplexity. Entity optimization & LLM visibility strategies.

My Stack

Tools & Expertise

Industry-leading SEO tools and technical skills for data-driven decision making.
